name: @mindfoldhq/trellis
description: AI capabilities grow like ivy — Trellis provides the structure to guide them along a disciplined path

scripts.release: git add -A && git diff-index --quiet HEAD || git commit -m 'chore: pre-release updates' && pnpm version patch && git push origin main --tags
scripts.release:minor: git add -A && git diff-index --quiet HEAD || git commit -m 'chore: pre-release updates' && pnpm version minor && git push origin main --tags
scripts.release:major: git add -A && git diff-index --quiet HEAD || git commit -m 'chore: pre-release updates' && pnpm version major && git push origin main --tags
scripts.release:beta: git add -A && git diff-index --quiet HEAD || git commit -m 'chore: pre-release updates' && pnpm version prerelease --preid beta && git push origin HEAD --tags
scripts.release:rc: git add -A && git diff-index --quiet HEAD || git commit -m 'chore: pre-release updates' && pnpm version prerelease --preid rc && git push origin HEAD --tags
scripts.release:promote: git add -A && git diff-index --quiet HEAD || git commit -m 'chore: pre-release updates' && pnpm version "$(node -p "require('./package.json').version.replace(/-.*/, '')")" && git push origin main --tags

author: Mindfold LLC
